narrative:
North Lewisburg Village has 1,057 registered voters, with 59.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.2 percentage points.
